Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class BasketOrder

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.BasketOrder
public class BasketOrder extends Object
BasketOrder

The message describing an order that has been added to a basket

  • Constructor Details

    • BasketOrder

      public BasketOrder(Optional<String> accountId, Optional<String> assetId, Optional<? extends BasketOrderAssetType> assetType, Optional<? extends List<BasketTradingExecutedPrice>> averagePrices, Optional<String> basketOrderId, Optional<? extends BasketOrderCancelInitiator> cancelInitiator, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientCancelReceivedTime, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientCancelSentTime, Optional<String> clientOrderId, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientOrderReceivedTime, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderCumulativeNotionalValue> cumulativeNotionalValue, Optional<String> currencyCode, Optional<? extends List<BasketTradingExecutions>> executions, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderExtraReportingData> extraReportingData, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderFilledQuantity> filledQuantity, Optional<String> identifier, Optional<? extends BasketOrderIdentifierType> identifierType, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> lastUpdateTime, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderMaxSellQuantity> maxSellQuantity, Optional<String> name, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderNotionalValue> notionalValue, Optional<? extends BasketOrderOrderRejectedReason> orderRejectedReason, Optional<? extends BasketOrderOrderStatus> orderStatus, Optional<? extends BasketOrderOrderType> orderType, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderQuantity> quantity, Optional<? extends BasketOrderSide> side, Optional<? extends List<BasketOrderSpecialReportingInstructions>> specialReportingInstructions, Optional<? extends BasketOrderTimeInForce> timeInForce)

    • BasketOrder

      public BasketOrder()

  • Method Details

    • accountId

      public Optional<String> accountId()
      The identifier of the account transacting this order

    • assetId

      public Optional<String> assetId()
      Apex Asset ID for this asset. This will not be returned in the initial CreateOrder response and will be available after an order completes validation. If the provided identifier does not match any Apex asset available for trading, an OrderRejectReason of "UNKNOWN_SECURITY" will be returned and the asset_id will not be set.

    • assetType

      public Optional<BasketOrderAssetType> assetType()
      The type of the asset in this order

    • averagePrices

      public Optional<List<BasketTradingExecutedPrice>> averagePrices()
      The average prices, as weighted averages, across all executions in this order. Will be absent if an order has no executions.

      When asset_type = EQUITY, there will be at most one value present, with a type of PRICE_PER_UNIT. This will have up to 4 decimal places for USD amounts less than $1, and a maximum of two for larger USD amounts.

    • basketOrderId

      public Optional<String> basketOrderId()
      System generated unique id for the basket order.

    • cancelInitiator

      public Optional<BasketOrderCancelInitiator> cancelInitiator()
      Output only field that is required for Equity Orders for any client who is having Apex do CAT reporting on their behalf. This field denotes the initiator of the cancel request. This field will be present when provided on the RemoveOrderRequest

    • clientCancelReceivedTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientCancelReceivedTime()
      Output only field for Equity Orders related to CAT reporting on behalf of clients. This field will be present when provided on the RemoveOrderRequest

    • clientCancelSentTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientCancelSentTime()
      Output only field for Equity Orders related to CAT reporting on behalf of clients. This field will be present when provided on the RemoveOrderRequest

    • clientOrderId

      public Optional<String> clientOrderId()
      User-supplied unique order ID. Cannot be more than 40 characters long.

    • clientOrderReceivedTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientOrderReceivedTime()
      Time the order request was received by the client. Must be in the past. Timezone will default to UTC if not provided.

    • createTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime()
      Time of the order creation

    • cumulativeNotionalValue

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<BasketOrderCumulativeNotionalValue> cumulativeNotionalValue()
      The product of order quantity & price, summed across all fills, reported in the currency specified in the order. (This will be rounded to 2 decimal places for USD currencies). Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • currencyCode

      public Optional<String> currencyCode()
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • executions

      public Optional<List<BasketTradingExecutions>> executions()
      The execution-level details that compose this order

    • extraReportingData

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<BasketOrderExtraReportingData> extraReportingData()
      Any reporting data provided by the SetExtraReportingData endpoint.

    • filledQuantity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<BasketOrderFilledQuantity> filledQuantity()
      The summed quantity value across all fills in this order, up to a maximum of 5 decimal places. Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • identifier

      public Optional<String> identifier()
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierType

      public Optional<BasketOrderIdentifierType> identifierType()
      The identifier type of the asset being ordered. For Equities: only SYMBOL is supported For Mutual Funds: only SYMBOL and CUSIP are supported

    • lastUpdateTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> lastUpdateTime()
      Time of the last order update

    • maxSellQuantity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<BasketOrderMaxSellQuantity> maxSellQuantity()
      The maximum number of shares to be sold if this is a notional SELL order of an Equity asset type. (Prohibited for other side or asset_type inputs.)

      This will only be recognized for clients configured to bypass the short sale risk check. When specified, must be greater than 0 and can't exceed 5 decimal places.

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      System generated name of the basket order.

    • notionalValue

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<BasketOrderNotionalValue> notionalValue()
      Notional quantity of the order, measured in USD. Maximum 2 decimal place precision. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: currently not supported yet For Mutual Funds: Only supported for BUY orders. The order will be transacted at the full notional amount specified.

    • orderRejectedReason

      public Optional<BasketOrderOrderRejectedReason> orderRejectedReason()
      When an order has the REJECTED status, this will be populated with a system code describing the rejection.

    • orderStatus

      public Optional<BasketOrderOrderStatus> orderStatus()
      The processing status of the order

    • orderType

      public Optional<BasketOrderOrderType> orderType()
      The execution type of this order.

    • quantity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<BasketOrderQuantity> quantity()
      Numeric quantity of the order. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: Represents the number of shares, must be greater than zero and may not exceed 5 decimal places. For Mutual Funds: Only supported for SELL orders. Represents the number of shares, up to a maximum of 3 decimal places.

    • side

      public Optional<BasketOrderSide> side()
      The side of this order.

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public Optional<List<BasketOrderSpecialReportingInstructions>> specialReportingInstructions()
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • timeInForce

      public Optional<BasketOrderTimeInForce> timeInForce()
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate that the system capture the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.

    • builder

      public static BasketOrder.Builder builder()

    • withAccountId

      public BasketOrder withAccountId(String accountId)
      The identifier of the account transacting this order

    • withAccountId

      public BasketOrder withAccountId(Optional<String> accountId)
      The identifier of the account transacting this order

    • withAssetId

      public BasketOrder withAssetId(String assetId)
      Apex Asset ID for this asset. This will not be returned in the initial CreateOrder response and will be available after an order completes validation. If the provided identifier does not match any Apex asset available for trading, an OrderRejectReason of "UNKNOWN_SECURITY" will be returned and the asset_id will not be set.

    • withAssetId

      public BasketOrder withAssetId(Optional<String> assetId)
      Apex Asset ID for this asset. This will not be returned in the initial CreateOrder response and will be available after an order completes validation. If the provided identifier does not match any Apex asset available for trading, an OrderRejectReason of "UNKNOWN_SECURITY" will be returned and the asset_id will not be set.

    • withAssetType

      public BasketOrder withAssetType(BasketOrderAssetType assetType)
      The type of the asset in this order

    • withAssetType

      public BasketOrder withAssetType(Optional<? extends BasketOrderAssetType> assetType)
      The type of the asset in this order

    • withAveragePrices

      public BasketOrder withAveragePrices(List<BasketTradingExecutedPrice> averagePrices)
      The average prices, as weighted averages, across all executions in this order. Will be absent if an order has no executions.

      When asset_type = EQUITY, there will be at most one value present, with a type of PRICE_PER_UNIT. This will have up to 4 decimal places for USD amounts less than $1, and a maximum of two for larger USD amounts.

    • withAveragePrices

      public BasketOrder withAveragePrices(Optional<? extends List<BasketTradingExecutedPrice>> averagePrices)
      The average prices, as weighted averages, across all executions in this order. Will be absent if an order has no executions.

      When asset_type = EQUITY, there will be at most one value present, with a type of PRICE_PER_UNIT. This will have up to 4 decimal places for USD amounts less than $1, and a maximum of two for larger USD amounts.

    • withBasketOrderId

      public BasketOrder withBasketOrderId(String basketOrderId)
      System generated unique id for the basket order.

    • withBasketOrderId

      public BasketOrder withBasketOrderId(Optional<String> basketOrderId)
      System generated unique id for the basket order.

    • withCancelInitiator

      public BasketOrder withCancelInitiator(BasketOrderCancelInitiator cancelInitiator)
      Output only field that is required for Equity Orders for any client who is having Apex do CAT reporting on their behalf. This field denotes the initiator of the cancel request. This field will be present when provided on the RemoveOrderRequest

    • withCancelInitiator

      public BasketOrder withCancelInitiator(Optional<? extends BasketOrderCancelInitiator> cancelInitiator)
      Output only field that is required for Equity Orders for any client who is having Apex do CAT reporting on their behalf. This field denotes the initiator of the cancel request. This field will be present when provided on the RemoveOrderRequest

    • withClientCancelReceivedTime

      public BasketOrder withClientCancelReceivedTime(OffsetDateTime clientCancelReceivedTime)
      Output only field for Equity Orders related to CAT reporting on behalf of clients. This field will be present when provided on the RemoveOrderRequest

      Output only field for Equity Orders related to CAT reporting on behalf of clients. This field will be present when provided on the RemoveOrderRequest

      Output only field for Equity Orders related to CAT reporting on behalf of clients. This field will be present when provided on the RemoveOrderRequest

      Output only field for Equity Orders related to CAT reporting on behalf of clients. This field will be present when provided on the RemoveOrderRequest

      public BasketOrder withClientOrderId(String clientOrderId)
      User-supplied unique order ID. Cannot be more than 40 characters long.

    • withClientOrderId

      public BasketOrder withClientOrderId(Optional<String> clientOrderId)
      User-supplied unique order ID. Cannot be more than 40 characters long.

    • withClientOrderReceivedTime

      public BasketOrder withClientOrderReceivedTime(OffsetDateTime clientOrderReceivedTime)
      Time the order request was received by the client. Must be in the past. Timezone will default to UTC if not provided.

      public BasketOrder withClientOrderReceivedTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientOrderReceivedTime)
      Time the order request was received by the client. Must be in the past. Timezone will default to UTC if not provided.

      Time of the order creation

    • withCreateTime

      public BasketOrder withCreateTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime)
      Time of the order creation

    • withCumulativeNotionalValue

      public BasketOrder withCumulativeNotionalValue(BasketOrderCumulativeNotionalValue cumulativeNotionalValue)
      The product of order quantity & price, summed across all fills, reported in the currency specified in the order. (This will be rounded to 2 decimal places for USD currencies). Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • withCumulativeNotionalValue

      public BasketOrder withCumulativeNotionalValue(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderCumulativeNotionalValue> cumulativeNotionalValue)
      The product of order quantity & price, summed across all fills, reported in the currency specified in the order. (This will be rounded to 2 decimal places for USD currencies). Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • withCurrencyCode

      public BasketOrder withCurrencyCode(String currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • withCurrencyCode

      public BasketOrder withCurrencyCode(Optional<String> currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • withExecutions

      public BasketOrder withExecutions(List<BasketTradingExecutions> executions)
      The execution-level details that compose this order

    • withExecutions

      public BasketOrder withExecutions(Optional<? extends List<BasketTradingExecutions>> executions)
      The execution-level details that compose this order

    • withExtraReportingData

      public BasketOrder withExtraReportingData(BasketOrderExtraReportingData extraReportingData)
      Any reporting data provided by the SetExtraReportingData endpoint.

    • withExtraReportingData

      public BasketOrder withExtraReportingData(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderExtraReportingData> extraReportingData)
      Any reporting data provided by the SetExtraReportingData endpoint.

    • withFilledQuantity

      public BasketOrder withFilledQuantity(BasketOrderFilledQuantity filledQuantity)
      The summed quantity value across all fills in this order, up to a maximum of 5 decimal places. Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • withFilledQuantity

      public BasketOrder withFilledQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderFilledQuantity> filledQuantity)
      The summed quantity value across all fills in this order, up to a maximum of 5 decimal places. Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • withIdentifier

      public BasketOrder withIdentifier(String identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • withIdentifier

      public BasketOrder withIdentifier(Optional<String> identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • withIdentifierType

      public BasketOrder withIdentifierType(BasketOrderIdentifierType identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset being ordered. For Equities: only SYMBOL is supported For Mutual Funds: only SYMBOL and CUSIP are supported

    • withIdentifierType

      public BasketOrder withIdentifierType(Optional<? extends BasketOrderIdentifierType> identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset being ordered. For Equities: only SYMBOL is supported For Mutual Funds: only SYMBOL and CUSIP are supported

    • withLastUpdateTime

      public BasketOrder withLastUpdateTime(OffsetDateTime lastUpdateTime)
      Time of the last order update

    • withLastUpdateTime

      public BasketOrder withLastUpdateTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> lastUpdateTime)
      Time of the last order update

    • withMaxSellQuantity

      public BasketOrder withMaxSellQuantity(BasketOrderMaxSellQuantity maxSellQuantity)
      The maximum number of shares to be sold if this is a notional SELL order of an Equity asset type. (Prohibited for other side or asset_type inputs.)

      This will only be recognized for clients configured to bypass the short sale risk check. When specified, must be greater than 0 and can't exceed 5 decimal places.

    • withMaxSellQuantity

      public BasketOrder withMaxSellQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderMaxSellQuantity> maxSellQuantity)
      The maximum number of shares to be sold if this is a notional SELL order of an Equity asset type. (Prohibited for other side or asset_type inputs.)

      This will only be recognized for clients configured to bypass the short sale risk check. When specified, must be greater than 0 and can't exceed 5 decimal places.

    • withName

      public BasketOrder withName(String name)
      System generated name of the basket order.

    • withName

      public BasketOrder withName(Optional<String> name)
      System generated name of the basket order.

    • withNotionalValue

      public BasketOrder withNotionalValue(BasketOrderNotionalValue notionalValue)
      Notional quantity of the order, measured in USD. Maximum 2 decimal place precision. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: currently not supported yet For Mutual Funds: Only supported for BUY orders. The order will be transacted at the full notional amount specified.

    • withNotionalValue

      public BasketOrder withNotionalValue(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderNotionalValue> notionalValue)
      Notional quantity of the order, measured in USD. Maximum 2 decimal place precision. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: currently not supported yet For Mutual Funds: Only supported for BUY orders. The order will be transacted at the full notional amount specified.

    • withOrderRejectedReason

      public BasketOrder withOrderRejectedReason(BasketOrderOrderRejectedReason orderRejectedReason)
      When an order has the REJECTED status, this will be populated with a system code describing the rejection.

    • withOrderRejectedReason

      public BasketOrder withOrderRejectedReason(Optional<? extends BasketOrderOrderRejectedReason> orderRejectedReason)
      When an order has the REJECTED status, this will be populated with a system code describing the rejection.

    • withOrderStatus

      public BasketOrder withOrderStatus(BasketOrderOrderStatus orderStatus)
      The processing status of the order

    • withOrderStatus

      public BasketOrder withOrderStatus(Optional<? extends BasketOrderOrderStatus> orderStatus)
      The processing status of the order

    • withOrderType

      public BasketOrder withOrderType(BasketOrderOrderType orderType)
      The execution type of this order.

    • withOrderType

      public BasketOrder withOrderType(Optional<? extends BasketOrderOrderType> orderType)
      The execution type of this order.

    • withQuantity

      public BasketOrder withQuantity(BasketOrderQuantity quantity)
      Numeric quantity of the order. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: Represents the number of shares, must be greater than zero and may not exceed 5 decimal places. For Mutual Funds: Only supported for SELL orders. Represents the number of shares, up to a maximum of 3 decimal places.

    • withQuantity

      public BasketOrder withQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BasketOrderQuantity> quantity)
      Numeric quantity of the order. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: Represents the number of shares, must be greater than zero and may not exceed 5 decimal places. For Mutual Funds: Only supported for SELL orders. Represents the number of shares, up to a maximum of 3 decimal places.

    • withSide

      public BasketOrder withSide(BasketOrderSide side)
      The side of this order.

    • withSide

      public BasketOrder withSide(Optional<? extends BasketOrderSide> side)
      The side of this order.

    • withSpecialReportingInstructions

      public BasketOrder withSpecialReportingInstructions(List<BasketOrderSpecialReportingInstructions> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • withSpecialReportingInstructions

      public BasketOrder withSpecialReportingInstructions(Optional<? extends List<BasketOrderSpecialReportingInstructions>> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • withTimeInForce

      public BasketOrder withTimeInForce(BasketOrderTimeInForce timeInForce)
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate that the system capture the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.

    • withTimeInForce

      public BasketOrder withTimeInForce(Optional<? extends BasketOrderTimeInForce> timeInForce)
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate that the system capture the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • toString
